fields.title: Fix agent list showing full messages - should only show type/id/state
fields.description:
The `agent list` command currently shows the last message from each agent (truncated to 140 chars). This consumes unnecessary context when listing agents.

Current behavior:
- `agent list` shows: ID, type, state, duration, AND the last message (↩ message...)
- This is noisy when you just want to see what agents exist

Expected behavior:
- `agent list` should only show: ID, type, state, duration
- The agent's final message should NOT be displayed in the collapsed view
- The message should still be visible when user presses Ctrl+O (expanded view)
- The raw result should still contain the full message for the main agent to use

Same fix applies to `agent wait` collapsed view - don't show messages until expanded.
fields.design:

fields.acceptance_criteria:
- `agent list` shows only agent ID, type, state, and duration (no message preview)
- `agent wait` in collapsed mode shows same compact view
- Pressing Ctrl+O expands to show the full agent message
- The raw tool result still contains the full agent message for LLM context
- Typecheck passes
fields.close_reason: Fixed: Added expanded check to condition - agent messages now only show in expanded view (Ctrl+O). Typecheck passed.
